{{nihongo|'''Unoe Shrine'''|（参考）鵜江神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Bitchū Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Unoe Shrine'''|（参考）鵜江神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Bitchū Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

{{nihongo|'''Unoe Shrine'''|（参考）鵜江神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Bitchū Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Unoe Shrine'''|（参考）鵜江神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Bitchū Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Unoe Shrine'''|（参考）鵜江神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Bitchū Province]].
